nasb.text: For if by now I had put forth My hand and struck you and your people with pestilence, you would then have been cut off from the earth.

esv.text: For by now I could have put out my hand and struck you and your people with pestilence, and you would have been cut off from the earth.

cnv.text: 如果我現在伸手用瘟疫擊打你和你的人民，你就早已從地上消滅了。

ccb.text: 我若用瘟疫攻击你和你的百姓，你们早就灭亡了。
